basic_details.job_title: Chennai Port Authority Kindergarten Teacher Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
basic_details.short_information: Chennai Port Authority Kindergarten Teacher Notification 2026 has been released on 15 May 2026 on the official website chennaiport.gov.in. A total of 2 vacancies have been announced through the Chennai Port Authority Kindergarten Teacher Recruitment 2026. Candidates up to 40 years of age who have completed Montessori Teacher Training are eligible to apply for these Kindergarten Teacher vacancies. The walk-in interview for Chennai Port Authority Kindergarten Teacher Recruitment 2026 is scheduled on 19 May 2026. Candidates can download the official notification PDF and attend the walk-in intervi

selection_process: Registration and Document Submission Scrutiny and Shortlisting Interview

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Chennai Port Authority KGT recruitment?
faq.answer: The recruitment is through a walk-in interview. The walk-in interview is scheduled for 19 May 2026. Candidates should report at the venue on this date.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Kindergarten Teacher post?
faq.answer: The required qualification for the Kindergarten Teacher (KGT) post is Montessori Teacher Trained.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Kindergarten Teacher position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Kindergarten Teacher (KGT) post is 40 years.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Kindergarten Teacher role?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Kindergarten Teacher (KGT) post will receive a salary of Rs. 20,000 per month.

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available for the Kindergarten Teacher post?
faq.answer: There are 2 vacancies available for the Kindergarten Teacher (KGT) post at the Chennai Port Authority.

faq.question: Q6. What is the mode of application for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The mode of application is Walk-in. Candidates need to attend the interview directly at the specified venue and time.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for the Chennai Port Authority KGT recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q8. What documents should I carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates should carry all original documents, one set of self-attested photocopies, ID proof, educational certificates, and experience certificates if applicable.

faq.question: Q9. Where is the walk-in interview for the Chennai Port Authority KGT recruitment going to be held?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be held in Chennai, Tamil Nadu. The exact venue details will be available in the official notification.

faq.question: Q10. What is the job type for the Kindergarten Teacher position?
faq.answer: The job type for the Kindergarten Teacher (KGT) post is Contractual.
